steps.t: Nagli can be found at Khadâsh-gâra. You should talk to Nagli.
A suitable log for sitting can be found beside Nagli at Khadâsh-gâra. Nagli has asked you to join him and the other Want-kin at the camp-fire at Khadâ…
Nagli set your supper beside you at Khadâsh-gâra. The Want-kin have begun their meal. You should share a supper with them.
Nagli can be found at Khadâsh-gâra. Nagli has asked to speak with you. You should talk to Nagli.
Firewood can be found at Khadâsh-gâra. Nagli has asked you to fetch some firewood to stoke the fire at Khadâsh-gâra. You should collect the firewood.
Nagli can be found at Khadâsh-gâra. You have brought more firewood to the fire at Khadâsh-gâra as Nagli asked. You should talk to Nagli.
Nagli can be found at Khadâsh-gâra. Nagli has asked to hear more tales of your adventures before coming to Elderslade. You should tell Nagli and the W…
Nagli can be found at Khadâsh-gâra. After Stórath expressed his displeasure in hosting you, Nagli and the other Want-kin defended your presence at Kha…
